title: Connectible Chains [Fabric]
description: Connect your fences with a decorative chain!
body:
Connect your fences and walls with a decorative chain!


## Description Connect your fences/walls with a decorative chain! Use the normal vanilla chain item on fences, walls, or iron bars! These chains have collision and can be broken when attacking it with a shear. \ Sneak on fences if you want to place them normally. ### Discontinued After five years of updates, I’ve decided to stop maintaining the mod. I no longer enjoy working on it and rarely play Minecraft these days, so I will no longer update Connectible Chains. The source code remains open for anyone to fork and continue. Maintained fork: [evanbones/Reconnectible-Chains](https://github.com/evanbones/Reconnectible-Chains) — The fork is independently maintained and is not affiliated with or endorsed by the original project. #### Issues If you have encountered any bugs or have some feedback, go to the GitHub [issues](https://github.com/legoatoom/ConnectibleChains/issues) page. #### Version Support I will not be supporting versions lower than 1.21.11 #### Compatibility with other mods See the wiki on how to add support for other mods yourself with just a datapack and a resource pack. #### Forge? 1. There is a forge port however I do not maintain it. \ https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/connectible-chains-forge 2. Sinytra Connector might also work. #### Other information If there are invisible collisions for some reason, hold a shear while having entity hitboxes on (F3+B) to see the collisions and then attack them to remove them.
